title: inputs
description: The inputs used to design or evaluate a Connector. Mirrors the MAS / CAS / RAS inputs structure (operatingPoints[] + designRequirements). Connectors are multi-port, so operating points use the PEAS multiPortOperatingPoint template (per-net current/voltage) rather than the two-terminal template.

operatingPoints.description: Operating points to evaluate. Each point carries per-net excitation (current, voltage) plus ambient conditions.
operatingPoints.title: operatingPoints
